action: ADR-0046 Layer 2: epistemic gate classes + identical-rejection instinct. (a) Classify deliverable reviewers at registration as fact-gate (ground truth: red_count, attestation hashes, artifact presence) vs heuristic-gate (lossy estimates: floor counts, prose classifiers); integrity floor (ship => build AND audit AND (tdd unless trivial)) is fact-class and NEVER demotable. (b) A heuristic gate rejecting with a byte-identical reason TEMPLATE across 2 consecutive cycles is a gate defect, not a work defect (real violations vary across cycles; identical rejections are determinism artifacts): run that gate shadow for the NEXT CYCLE ONLY, auto-file an inbox HIGH, attach the would-block WARN to the artifact so audit sees it. Implement as a new signature class in the existing faillearn/instinct machinery (S5 fatal-signature pattern, .evolve/instincts/) keyed on gate-id + reason-template hash from failedApproaches — NOT a new subsystem. One-cycle scope + auto-filed defect keeps fail-twice-and-the-gate-gives-up ungameable. (c) Gate admission rules: every enforce-mode reviewer must expose its exact check as an agent-runnable CLI (extend the `evolve phase verify` family) and correction directives must cite that command; heuristic gates must ship with a golden corpus harvested from PRODUCTION runs including environmental inputs (the R9.2 bug shipped because knownPkgsFixture omitted the colliding basenames — the fixture lied about production). TDD pins: replay cycles 301-302 failedApproaches → demotion fires on cycle 2, integrity-floor gates never demote, demotion auto-files exactly one inbox item.
evidence_pointer: docs/architecture/adr/0046-gate-epistemics-and-self-deploy.md (Layer 2); go/internal/triagecap/reviewer.go (the demotable-gate exemplar); .evolve/instincts/ (S5 pattern); state.json failedApproaches cycles 301+302
